surfaces.label: Client-safe summary
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText:
CLIENT-SAFE SUMMARY
(not for court or CPS)

We are reviewing the papers for Daniel Pike. This is early-stage — nothing is final until we have full disclosure and your instructions. A draft complainant statement is on the papers, but the ABE interview video, transcript, and final signed MG11 are still outstanding. We cannot rely on the served draft alone for hearing position. This is a historic allegation — the ABE interview video is referred on the schedule but not on the bundle we have reviewed.

[CaseBrain — client-safe summary. Evidence state: provisional. Not for court or CPS use.]
